originContent: Yuebing 🥮
translatedContent: Yuebing 🥮

originContent: Yuebing is open-source software for running video hosting sites.
translatedContent: Yuebing 是用于运行视频托管网站的开源软件。

originContent: Yuebing automatically prepares your source videos for streaming using modern formats, playable on any
translatedContent: Yuebing 会自动将您的源视频准备为现代格式的流媒体，可在任何设备和任何网络连接上播放。

originContent: device over any connection.

translatedContent: Yuebing 可以使用 Amazon S3 或 Backblaze B2 作为后端存储，并具有许多高级功能。

originContent: Yuebing can use either Amazon S3 or Backblaze B2 for backend storage, and has many advanced features.

translatedContent: ### 来源

originContent: ### Source

originContent: ## Inspiration
translatedContent: ## 灵感来源

originContent: Last year my mom spent a ton of time (and money!) to organize and digitize an archive of old family videos.
translatedContent: 去年我妈妈花了大量时间（和金钱！）来整理和数字化一批旧家庭录像。

originContent: Some of these were quite old, going back to the 1940's. Really beautiful, classic stuff.
translatedContent: 其中一些非常古老，追溯到1940年代。非常美丽，经典的素材。

originContent: We wanted to privately share these with family, but *not with big tech*.
translatedContent: 我们想私下与家人分享这些视频，但*不想让大科技公司知道*。

originContent: Going with "free" video hosting from a major provider was off the table.
translatedContent: 使用大型提供商的“免费”视频托管根本不在考虑之列。

originContent: What we were looking for:
translatedContent: 我们的需求是：

originContent: * Self-hosted, but totally **hands-off easy** to run and maintain
translatedContent: * 自托管，但完全**免维护且易于运行**

originContent: * Streams in modern video formats, including adaptive bitrate
translatedContent: * 支持现代视频格式流，包括自适应码率

originContent: * Videos play on any device, desktop or mobile
translatedContent: * 视频能在任何设备播放，无论是桌面还是移动端

originContent: * With a high-bandwidth connection, video quality is awesome; as good as it gets
translatedContent: * 在高速带宽下，视频质量极佳；达到最佳效果

originContent: * **Even with a bad connection**, playback is decent quality and *doesn't skip or buffer*
translatedContent: * **即使网络状况差**，播放质量依然不错且*不卡顿不缓冲*

originContent: * Encrypted storage, thus able to use public cloud storage solutions with some confidence
translatedContent: * 加密存储，因此可以有信心使用公共云存储解决方案

originContent: * Stateless server: persist anything important to storage that is highly resilient
translatedContent: * 无状态服务器：将重要数据持久化到高可用存储

originContent: * **I don't want to worry about backups!**
translatedContent: * **我不想担心备份问题！**

originContent: * *This was a nice to have. As it turns out nothing out there has anything like this. Yuebing does!*
translatedContent: * *这是个额外加分项。事实证明市面上没有类似方案。Yuebing 有！*

originContent: * After running a beefy instance to transcode everything, tear it down and run something cheaper for the long-run
translatedContent: * 先运行高性能实例转码所有视频，完成后拆除，长期运行更便宜的方案

originContent: * You can run Yuebing for under $10/month; and hopefully even less down the road as we optimize Yuebing's footprint
translatedContent: * 你可以用不到10美元/月运行 Yuebing；随着优化，未来成本还会更低

originContent: I took a couple of weeks to survey what was out there. I started to greatly relax my requirements, and still
translatedContent: 我花了几周时间调研现有方案。我开始大幅放宽需求，依然

originContent: could find nothing decent. I looked at several open source projects, I'm not saying which because they all had
translatedContent: 找不到合适的。看了几个开源项目，不点名了，因为它们都有

originContent: multiple glaring flaws.
translatedContent: 多个明显缺陷。

originContent: So, I decided, how hard could it be? You wire up S3 to ffmpeg, put a decently modern frontend on it, and you're done, right?
translatedContent: 于是我想，能有多难呢？把 S3 接到 ffmpeg，搭个还算现代的前端，就完事了，对吧？

originContent: ... well, uh, the bulk of the work took a couple of months, but it was too much fun to stop!
translatedContent: ... 好吧，呃，大部分工作花了几个月时间，但实在太有趣了，停不下来！

originContent: I hope you enjoy it too!
translatedContent: 希望你也会喜欢！

originContent: ### **Let's make self-hosting video sites super-easy!**
translatedContent: ### **让自托管视频站点变得超级简单！**

originContent: ## Features
translatedContent: ## 功能

originContent: * Transform an S3 (or B2) bucket of videos into a private video site for friends and family!
translatedContent: * 将 S3（或 B2）视频桶转换为朋友和家人的私人视频站点！

originContent: * Connect one or more source buckets providing raw media files
translatedContent: * 连接一个或多个源桶，提供原始媒体文件

originContent: * Yuebing automatically transcodes source videos into the latest and most widely supported format for adaptive bitrate streaming (DASH/mp4)
translatedContent: * Yuebing 自动将源视频转码为最新且最广泛支持的自适应码率流格式（DASH/mp4）

originContent: * ALL data is stored in the destination bucket; you can destroy the server whenever you want
translatedContent: * 所有数据均存储在目标桶中；你可以随时销毁服务器

originContent: * Useful for running initially on a CPU-optimized instance for the initial transcoding, then run \
translatedContent: * 适合初期在 CPU 优化实例上进行转码，然后切换到更便宜的实例实现全天候服务。

originContent: on a much cheaper instance for 24/7/365 service.
translatedContent: * 支持全加密存储（应用端加密，只有你拥有密钥）

originContent: * Supports fully encrypted storage (app-side encryption, only you have the key)
translatedContent: * 源数据始终只读，绝不更改源内容

originContent: * Always read-only from source, never change source content
translatedContent: * 自动及手动扫描新媒体文件

originContent: * Automatic and manual scanning for new media files
translatedContent: * 你想要多私密或多公开？Yuebing 支持：

originContent: * How private or public do you want things? Yuebing supports:
translatedContent: * 完全私密：匿名用户看不到任何媒体，只有获批邮箱可创建账户

originContent: * Totally private: no media shown to anonymous users, only approved email addresses can create accounts
translatedContent: * 半私密：匿名用户看不到媒体，但任何人都可以创建用户账户

originContent: * Semi-private: no media shown to anonymous users, but anyone can create a user account
translatedContent: * 限制注册的公开：所有人可见媒体，但只有获批邮箱可创建账户

originContent: * Public with limited registration: media shown to everyone, but only approved email addresses can create accounts
translatedContent: * 完全公开：所有人可见媒体，任何人都可以创建用户账户

originContent: * Totally public: media shown to everyone, and anyone can create a user account
translatedContent: * 完全国际化！所有用户可见文本（及其他本地化相关内容）均来自本地化资源

originContent: * Fully internationalized! All user-visible text (and other locale-specific stuff) comes from localized resources
translatedContent: * [帮助社区，把 Yuebing 翻译成更多语言！](https://github.com/cobbzilla/yuebing/blob/master/docs/localize.md)

originContent: * [Help the community, translate Yuebing to new languages!](https://github.com/cobbzilla/yuebing/blob/master/docs/localize.md)
translatedContent: * 功能齐全的管理控制台

originContent: * Full-featured admin console
translatedContent: * 通过关键词或标签云搜索视频

originContent: * Search videos by keywords, or from tag cloud
translatedContent: * **有你的支持即将推出**：

originContent: * **Coming soon with your support**:
translatedContent: * 支持更多媒体类型（音频、图片等）

originContent: * Support for more media types (audio, images, etc)
translatedContent: * 用户上传媒体

originContent: * User-uploaded media
translatedContent: * 点赞、分享及推送通知

originContent: * Likes, shares, and push notifications
translatedContent: * 新“源类型”：另一个 Yuebing 实例！

originContent: * New "source type": Another Yuebing instance!
translatedContent: * 友好实例间的联合：统一搜索、用户账户等

originContent: * Federation between friendly instances: unified search, user accounts, etc

translatedContent: ## 匿名用户功能（若站点配置允许匿名访问）

originContent: ## Anonymous user feature (if the site has been configured to allow anonymous visitors)
translatedContent: * 浏览媒体

originContent: * Browse media
translatedContent: * 观看媒体！

originContent: * Watch media!
translatedContent: * 创建账户（若站点配置允许注册）

originContent: * Create account (if the site has been configured to allow account registration)

translatedContent: ## 登录用户功能

originContent: ## Logged-in user features
translatedContent: * 浏览媒体

originContent: * Browse media
translatedContent: * 观看媒体！

originContent: * Watch media!
translatedContent: * 添加评论，编辑评论，删除评论！

originContent: * Add a comment, edit your comment, delete your comment!
* Invite friends
translatedContent: * 邀请朋友

originContent: * Edit account info
translatedContent: * 编辑账户信息

originContent: * Delete account, deletes everything that's yours including all your comments
translatedContent: * 删除账户，删除属于你的所有内容，包括你所有的评论

originContent: ## Admin user features
translatedContent: ## 管理员用户功能

originContent: * Edit media metadata, view thumbnails, change selected thumbnail
translatedContent: * 编辑媒体元数据，查看缩略图，改变选定的缩略图

originContent: * View media transform queue and job status
translatedContent: * 查看媒体转换队列和作业状态

originContent: * Start new scans and indexes of source media
translatedContent: * 启动新的扫描和源媒体索引

originContent: ## Server/backend features
translatedContent: ## 服务器/后端功能

originContent: * Transient-friendly, ZERO persistent/important data is stored within the container.
translatedContent: * 适合瞬态，容器内不存储任何持久/重要数据。

originContent: * All durable data is persisted in the destination bucket; essentially, we use S3 as our database
translatedContent: * 所有耐久数据保存在目标桶中；本质上，我们使用 S3 作为数据库

originContent: * Automatic periodic scanning of source bucket for new media
translatedContent: * 自动定期扫描源桶以查找新媒体

originContent: * Add and change media metadata; edits are stored on the destination bucket, source media is never modified
translatedContent: * 添加和更改媒体元数据；编辑内容存储在目标桶中，源媒体永远不会被修改

originContent: * Configurable output profiles. Default is DASH-mp4 with multiple sub-profiles
translatedContent: * 可配置输出配置文件。默认是带有多个子配置文件的 DASH-mp4

originContent: * User account info is also stored on the destination bucket, optionally encrypted
translatedContent: * 用户账户信息也存储在目标桶中，可选择加密

originContent: * If encryption key is changed, admin can migrate users to the new key with web admin console
translatedContent: * 如果加密密钥更改，管理员可以通过网页管理控制台将用户迁移到新密钥

originContent: ## Installation
translatedContent: ## 安装

originContent: You can install and run `yuebing` via docker, npm or directly from source.
translatedContent: 你可以通过 docker、npm 或直接从源码安装并运行 `yuebing`。

originContent: ### Docker
translatedContent: ### Docker

originContent: If you have docker, you can get started with Yuebing quickly:
translatedContent: 如果你有 docker，可以快速开始使用 Yuebing：

originContent: docker run -it cobbzilla/yuebing
translatedContent: docker run -it cobbzilla/yuebing

originContent: ### npm package
translatedContent: ### npm 包

originContent: # install globally with npm
translatedContent: # 使用 npm 全局安装

originContent: npm i -g yuebing
translatedContent: npm i -g yuebing

originContent: # install globally with yarn
translatedContent: # 使用 yarn 全局安装

originContent: yarn global add yuebing
translatedContent: yarn global add yuebing

originContent: # Now the 'yuebing' command should be on your PATH
translatedContent: # 现在 'yuebing' 命令应该在你的 PATH 中

originContent: yuebing
translatedContent: yuebing

originContent: ### From source
translatedContent: ### 从源码

originContent: To run from source, you'll need nodejs v16+ and yarn
translatedContent: 从源码运行，你需要 nodejs v16+ 和 yarn

originContent: # Clone source and install dependencies
translatedContent: # 克隆源码并安装依赖

originContent: git clone https://github.com/cobbzilla/yuebing.git
translatedContent: git clone https://github.com/cobbzilla/yuebing.git

originContent: cd yuebing
translatedContent: cd yuebing

originContent: yarn install
translatedContent: yarn install

originContent: # Use the 'yuebing' command from the git repo
translatedContent: # 使用 git 仓库中的 'yuebing' 命令

originContent: ./yuebing
translatedContent: ./yuebing

originContent: # Or, since you have the source, run any of the `yarn` scripts
translatedContent: # 或者，因为你有源码，可以运行任何 `yarn` 脚本

originContent: yarn docker-run-dev    # Fastest build & startup, dev docker image
translatedContent: yarn docker-run-dev    # 构建和启动最快，开发用 docker 镜像

originContent: yarn docker-run        # Faster at runtime, production docker image
translatedContent: yarn docker-run        # 运行时更快，生产用 docker 镜像

originContent: yarn dev               # Run yuebing locally in dev mode
translatedContent: yarn dev               # 在本地开发模式下运行 yuebing

originContent: yarn build             # Build yuebing locally for production mode
translatedContent: yarn build             # 本地构建 yuebing 生产版本

originContent: yarn start             # Start yuebing locally in production mode
translatedContent: yarn start             # 本地启动 yuebing 生产模式

originContent: See the [developer docs](https://github.com/cobbzilla/yuebing/blob/master/docs/developer.md) for more info
translatedContent: 详情请参阅 [开发者文档](https://github.com/cobbzilla/yuebing/blob/master/docs/developer.md)

originContent: ## Configuration
translatedContent: ## 配置

originContent: To play around with Yuebing, it's fine to start it without configuring anything.
translatedContent: 要玩转 Yuebing，可以不做任何配置直接启动。

originContent: Run `yuebing` and you'll be prompted to enter the minimal config when it starts.
translatedContent: 运行 `yuebing`，启动时会提示你输入最小配置。

originContent: If you plan on running Yuebing for a while, see the [configuration docs](https://github.com/cobbzilla/yuebing/blob/master/docs/config.md) for
translatedContent: 如果计划长时间运行 Yuebing，请参阅 [配置文档](https://github.com/cobbzilla/yuebing/blob/master/docs/config.md)

originContent: more info on how to set things up.
translatedContent: 了解更多设置方法。

originContent: ### nginx config
translatedContent: ### nginx 配置

originContent: Yuebing is a Nuxt app, and expects that you'll put nginx (or some other web server) in
translatedContent: Yuebing 是一个 Nuxt 应用，期望你在它前面放置 nginx（或其他 Web 服务器）

originContent: front of it to handle SSL, rate limiting if needed, etc.
translatedContent: 来处理 SSL、限速等功能（如果需要）。

originContent: If you're using nginx, here is a [sample config](https://github.com/cobbzilla/yuebing/blob/master/docs/sample-yuebing-nginx.conf) you can use.
translatedContent: 如果使用 nginx，这里有一个 [示例配置](https://github.com/cobbzilla/yuebing/blob/master/docs/sample-yuebing-nginx.conf) 可供使用。

originContent: ## Why the name yuebing?
translatedContent: ## 为什么叫 yuebing？

originContent: [Oolong the rabbit](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oolong_(rabbit)) was an adorable and famous
translatedContent: [乌龙兔](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oolong_(rabbit)) 是一个可爱且著名的

originContent: [early internet meme](https://duckduckgo.com/?q=oolong+rabbit&ia=images&iax=images). Oolong died in 2003,
translatedContent: [早期网络表情](https://duckduckgo.com/?q=oolong+rabbit&ia=images&iax=images)。乌龙于 2003 年去世，

originContent: two years before a certain massively popular video service even existed!
translatedContent: 那时距离某个极其流行的视频服务诞生还早两年！

originContent: Oolong's successor was named Yuebing. Yuebing wasn't nearly as famous as Oolong, but did that even matter?
translatedContent: 乌龙的继任者名叫 Yuebing。Yuebing 没有乌龙那么出名，但这重要吗？

originContent: Yuebing succeeded nonetheless.
translatedContent: Yuebing 依然成功了。

originContent: Perhaps more interestingly, yuebing means [mooncake](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mooncake)
translatedContent: 或许更有趣的是，yuebing 的意思是 [月饼](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mooncake)

originContent: (Chinese: [月饼](https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E6%9C%88%E9%A5%BC),
translatedContent: （中文：[月饼](https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E6%9C%88%E9%A5%BC)，

originContent: Japanese: [月餅](https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E6%9C%88%E9%A4%85)); mooncakes are very tasty and can be found in
translatedContent: 日文：[月餅](https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E6%9C%88%E9%A4%85)）；月饼非常美味，可以在

originContent: a wide variety of flavors and styles. Enjoy a time-honored regional style, or try an exotic cake from contemporary
translatedContent: 各种风味和风格。享受一种历久弥新的地方风味，或尝试当代面包师探索美味未知领域的异国蛋糕！确实有适合每个人的月饼！

originContent: bakers who are exploring deliciously uncharted territory! There is truly a yuebing for everyone!
